pkgmetadata.longdescription: An n-gram is a natural language processing technique for determining, given a list of words and a phrase, the probability that each of the words given will follow in the phrase. The executable provided asks for a phrase and a list of alternate ending words. It also asks for the type of n-gram to create (e.g., bi-gram, tri-gram). The probability for each possible phrase is then calculated using Google search results.
